title: Campaign & Sector Management

actors.name: Player
actors.description: Human user interacting with campaign UI

actors.name: GameSystem
actors.description: Game engine / control layer (control.playSector, universe, events)

use_cases.name: View Planet Map
use_cases.notes: Shows 3D planet with selectable sectors; restores last planet; announces newly unlocked sectors; first-time players get campaign selection dialog (Serpulo vs Erekir)

use_cases.name: Select Planet
use_cases.notes: Player clicks planet button in sidebar or taps 3D planet; switches state.planet, resets selection, calls rebuildExpand()

use_cases.name: Hover / Select Sector
use_cases.trigger: tap on mainView → selected = hovered → updateSelected()
use_cases.notes: Single tap selects sector; double-tap on already-selected sector triggers playSelected(); canSelect() checks mode, locks, shields, bases

use_cases.name: View Sector Info / Stats
use_cases.notes: Shows playtime, wave, threat, resources, production, export, import, stored items. Accessible via '@stats' button on captured sectors. Includes 'Abandon Sector' button.

use_cases.name: Configure Campaign Rules
use_cases.notes: Visible when state.planet.allowCampaignRules && mode != planetLaunch. Rules: difficulty (Difficulty.all), sectorInvasion, fog, showSpawns, randomWaveAI, pauseDisabled, rtsAI, clearSectorOnLose. On hide: planet.saveRules(); if in campaign applies via planet.campaignRules.apply() + Call.setRules()

use_cases.name: Launch to New Sector
use_cases.notes: Finds launcher sector via findLauncher(). If no launcher: free launch via control.playSector(sector). If launcher found: opens LaunchLoadoutDialog.show(block, from, sector, confirm). On confirm: fires SectorLaunchLoadoutEvent, calls control.playSector(from, sector), optionally plays launch animation via renderer.showLaunch(core)

use_cases.name: Configure Launch Loadout
use_cases.trigger: LaunchLoadoutDialog.show(CoreBlock, Sector from, Sector destination, Runnable confirm)
use_cases.notes: Player picks schematic (if destination.allowLaunchSchematics()), toggles max resources, edits resources via LoadoutDialog. Validates item availability (valid = sitems.has(total)). Launch button disabled if !valid. On confirm: universe.updateLoadout(core, selected)

use_cases.name: Resume / Enter Existing Sector
use_cases.notes: If already being played: hide() and return. Otherwise: control.playSector(sector) directly (no loadout dialog)

use_cases.name: Select Sector for Planet Launch
use_cases.notes: Inter-planet launch mode. launchCandidates defines reachable planets. On sector selection: listener.get(sector). Cannot land on sectors with addStartingItems=true or existing bases

use_cases.name: Select Destination Sector
use_cases.notes: Used when another system needs player to pick a sector with a base on the same planet. On selection: listener.get(sector)

use_cases.name: View Campaign Completion
use_cases.notes: Shown when planet campaign is complete. Displays planet name + total playtime (summed across all sectors with saves). Buttons: '@menu' (hide + ui.paused.runExitSave) and '@continue' (hide). Animated slide-in

use_cases.name: Abandon Sector
use_cases.notes: Confirm dialog. If sector isBeingPlayed: kills all player cores. Else: clears sector info (items, hasCore, production). Calls updateSelected() + rebuildList()

use_cases.name: Rename Sector
use_cases.trigger: pencil icon in sectorTop → ui.showTextInput → sector.setName(v)
use_cases.notes: Available for non-preset sectors. Updates display via updateSelected() + rebuildList()

use_cases.name: Change Sector Icon
use_cases.trigger: icon button in sectorTop → inline Dialog with icon/content grid
use_cases.notes: Sets sector.info.icon (string key) or sector.info.contentIcon (UnlockableContent). Saves via sector.saveInfo()

use_cases.name: Browse Sector List
use_cases.notes: Right-side collapsible panel; shows all sectors with bases, sorted by attacked status then playtime; searchable; clicking a sector calls lookAt + updateSelected

use_cases.name: Search & Select Sector (Debug)
use_cases.notes: Internal/debug use only. Filters sectors by planet + requireUnlock. On selection: cons.get(sector) + hide()

include_relationships: UC6 includes UC7 (when launcher sector found, LaunchLoadoutDialog is shown before launch)
UC4 includes UC12 (Abandon Sector accessible from Sector Stats dialog)
UC1 includes UC2 (planet selection is part of map view)
UC1 includes UC15 (sector list panel is part of map view)
extend_relationships: UC5 extends UC1 (campaign rules button visible on planet map, extends normal map view)
UC13 extends UC3 (rename available after sector selected)
UC14 extends UC3 (change icon available after sector selected)

key_classes.name: CampaignRulesDialog
key_classes.on_hide: planet.saveRules(); if in campaign: planet.campaignRules.apply(planet, state.rules); Call.setRules()

key_classes.name: LaunchLoadoutDialog
key_methods: show(CoreBlock, Sector from, Sector destination, Runnable confirm)
key_classes.notes: Calculates item requirements; validates against sector inventory; calls universe.updateLoadout on confirm

key_classes.name: CampaignCompleteDialog
key_classes.notes: Animated slide-in. Menu button calls ui.paused.runExitSave()

important_notes: PlanetDialog is the central hub; it composes LaunchLoadoutDialog and SectorSelectDialog directly. CampaignRulesDialog accessed via ui.campaignRules (Vars global). CampaignCompleteDialog is standalone, triggered externally when planet campaign ends. Campaign flow: View Planet → Select Sector → (Launch Loadout if new sector) → Play Sector → (Complete Campaign).
